ideation: This sequence simulates the act of pointing upward with the index finger.  Since our robot lacks fingers, we'll approximate the gesture by extending a single arm directly upward and slightly tilting the wrist. The other arm will remain at rest to maintain balance and draw focus to the pointing arm. We'll use a 3-frame sequence to keep the animation concise and impactful. Frame 1 will show both arms at rest. Frame 2 will initiate the upward pointing motion with the right arm. Frame 3 will show the right arm fully extended and tilted, completing the pointing gesture.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, ready
the right arm begins to lift, pointing up
the right arm extends fully, a clear upward gesture
